events.message: `workflow_gate` 的前置行数门禁与本缺陷无关，所以我改成自举一个隔离 runtime，直接做同会话两次 `/api/tasks/execute` smoke。这样既能验证首条任务恢复，也能验证锁释放后第二条还能继续成功。

item.text: `workflow_gate` 的前置行数门禁与本缺陷无关，所以我改成自举一个隔离 runtime，直接做同会话两次 `/api/tasks/execute` smoke。这样既能验证首条任务恢复，也能验证锁释放后第二条还能继续成功。

{"type":"item.started","item":{"id":"item_70","type":"command_execution","command":""C:\\WINDOWS\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe" -Command "powershell.exe -File C:/Users/jmqj/.codex/skills/test-session-manager/scripts/run-test-in-session.ps1 -RootPath . -TestCommand \"@'
from __future__ import annotations

import json
import shutil
import subprocess
import sys
from pathlib import Path

repo_root = Path('.').resolve()
sys.path.insert(0, str((repo_root / 'scripts' / 'acceptance').resolve()))
import run_acceptance_workflow_gate as gate  # type: ignore
from policy_cache_seed import upsert_policy_cache  # type: ignore

runtime_root = (repo_root / '.test' / 'runtime' / 'task-execute-lock-smoke').resolve()
if runtime_root.exists():
    shutil.rmtree(runtime_root, ignore_errors=True)
runtime_root.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
fixture_root = gate.write_agents_fixture(runtime_root)
upsert_policy_cache(
    runtime_root=runtime_root,
    workspace_root=fixture_root,
    specs=[
        {
            'agent_name': 'trainer',
            'role_profile': '你是训练执行助手。',
            'session_goal': '在职责边界内完成用户要求并输出可验证结果。',
            'duty_constraints': [
                '先复述任务目标与约束，再给执行步骤。',
                '输出必须包含可验证结果与回归检查点。',
                '仅在 agent_search_root 范围内进行文件写入。',
            ],
            'clarity_score': 90,
            'clarity_gate': 'auto',
            'parse_status': 'ok',
            'policy_extract_ok': True,
        }
    ],
)
base = 'http://127.0.0.1:8098'
entry_script = (repo_root / 'scripts' / 'workflow_entry_cli.py').resolve()
web_script = (repo_root / 'scripts' / 'workflow_web_server.py').resolve()
proc = subprocess.Popen(
    [
        sys.executable,
        str(web_script),
        '--root', runtime_root.as_posix(),
        '--entry-script', entry_script.as_posix(),
        '--agent-search-root', fixture_root.as_posix(),
        '--host', '127.0.0.1',
        '--port', '8098',
    ],
    cwd=str(repo_root),
    stdout=subprocess.PIPE,
    stderr=subprocess.PIPE,
    text=True,
)
try:
    gate.wait_health(base)
    gate.close_existing_sessions(base)
    session_payload, create_mode = gate.create_session_with_fallback(
        base,
        agent_name='trainer',
        focus='lock-smoke',
        agent_search_root=fixture_root.as_posix(),
        is_test_data=True,
    )
    session_id = str(session_payload['session_id'])
    runs = []
    for idx in range(2):
        expected = f'LOCK-SMOKE-{idx + 1}'
        status, payload = gate.call(
            base,
            'POST',
            '/api/tasks/execute',
            {
                'agent_name': 'trainer',
                'session_id': session_id,
                'focus': 'lock-smoke',
                'agent_search_root': fixture_root.as_posix(),
                'message': f'只回复标签 {expected}',
            },
        )
        if status "'!= 202 or not payload.get('"'ok'):
            raise RuntimeError(f'task create failed round={idx + 1}: {status} {payload}')
        task_id = str(payload['task_id'])
        row = gate.wait_task_done(base, task_id, timeout=180)
        msg_status, msg_payload = gate.call(base, 'GET', f'/api/chat/sessions/{session_id}/messages')
        messages = list(msg_payload.get('messages') or []) if msg_status == 200 else []
        assistant_messages = [
            str(item.get('content') or '')
            for item in messages
            if str(item.get('role') or '') == 'assistant'
        ]
        assistant_reply = assistant_messages[-1] if assistant_messages else ''
        runs.append(
            {
                'round': idx + 1,
                'task_id': task_id,
                'status': row.get('status'),
                'summary': row.get('summary'),
                'assistant_reply': assistant_reply,
                'assistant_contains_expected': expected in assistant_reply,
            }
        )
    ok = all(str(item['status']).lower() == 'success' and item['assistant_contains_expected'] for item in runs)
    if not ok:
        raise RuntimeError(json.dumps({'create_mode': create_mode, 'session_id': session_id, 'runs': runs}, ensure_ascii=False))
    print(json.dumps({'ok': True, 'create_mode': create_mode, 'session_id': session_id, 'runs': runs}, ensure_ascii=False))
finally:
    try:
        proc.terminate()
        proc.wait(timeout=10)
    except Exception:
        proc.kill()
'@ | python -\""","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}

function Add-RunLogLine {
    param([string]$Line)

    Add-Content -Path $runLogPath -Value $Line -Encoding UTF8
}

function Get-DirectoryStats {
    param([string]$Path)

    if (-not (Test-Path -Path $Path)) {
        return [ordered]@{
            file_count = 0
            total_bytes = 0
        }
    }

    $files = @(Get-ChildItem -Path $Path -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
    $totalBytes = 0
    foreach ($file in $files) {
        $totalBytes += $file.Length
    }

    return [ordered]@{
        file_count = $files.Count
        total_bytes = $totalBytes
    }
}

function Build-SummaryMarkdown {
    param([object[]]$HistoryItems)

    $lines = @(
        "# Test Report Summary",
        "",
        ("- Generated At (UTC): {0}" -f (Get-Date).ToUniversalTime().ToString("o")),
        "",
        "## Last 20 Sessions",
        "",
        "| Session | Status | Exit | Duration(ms) | Started(UTC) | Command |",
        "|---|---:|---:|---:|---|---|"
    )

    $recent = @($HistoryItems | Sort-Object started_at_utc -Descending | Select-Object -First 20)
    foreach ($item in $recent) {
        $commandText = [string]$item.command
        $commandText = $commandText.Replace("|", "\\|")
        if ($commandText.Length -gt 80) {
            $commandText = $commandText.Substring(0, 77) + "..."
        }

        $lines += ("| {0} | {1} | {2} | {3} | {4} | {5} |" -f `
            $item.session_id, $item.status, $item.exit_code, $item.duration_ms, $item.started_at_utc, $commandText)
    }

    if ($recent.Count -eq 0) {
        $lines += "| - | - | - | - | - | - |"
    }

    return ($lines -join [Environment]::NewLine)
}

$previousTmp = $env:TMP
$previousTemp = $env:TEMP
$previousTmpDir = $env:TMPDIR
$previousSessionDir = $env:TEST_SESSION_DIR
$previousLogDir = $env:TEST_LOG_DIR
$previousTmpVar = $env:TEST_TMP_DIR
$previousArtifactsDir = $env:TEST_ARTIFACTS_DIR

$env:TMP = $tmpPath
$env:TEMP = $tmpPath
$env:TMPDIR = $tmpPath
$env:TEST_SESSION_DIR = $resolvedSessionPath

$env:TEST_TMP_DIR = $tmpPath
$env:TEST_ARTIFACTS_DIR = $artifactsPath

$startUtc = (Get-Date).ToUniversalTime()
$global:LASTEXITCODE = $null
$exitCode = 1

"[{0}] Running command: {1}" -f (Get-Date).ToString("s"), $commandLine | Set-Content -Path $runLogPath -Encoding UTF8

Push-Location -Path $resolvedRoot
try {
    cmd.exe /d /s /c $TestCommand 2>&1 | ForEach-Object {
        $line = $_.ToString()
        Write-Output $line
        Add-RunLogLine -Line $line
    }

    if ($null -ne $LASTEXITCODE) {
        $exitCode = [int]$LASTEXITCODE
    }
    elseif ($?) {
        $exitCode = 0
    }
    else {
        $exitCode = 1
    }
}
catch {
    $errorText = ($_ | Out-String).TrimEnd()
    if (-not [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($errorText)) {
        Write-Output $errorText
        Add-RunLogLine -Line $errorText
    }
    $exitCode = 1
}
finally {
    Pop-Location

    $endUtc = (Get-Date).ToUniversalTime()
    $durationMs = [math]::Round(($endUtc - $startUtc).TotalMilliseconds)
    $status = if ($exitCode -eq 0) { "PASS" } else { "FAIL" }
    $tmpStats = Get-DirectoryStats -Path $tmpPath
    $artifactStats = Get-DirectoryStats -Path $artifactsPath
    $logBytes = if (Test-Path -Path $runLogPath) { (Get-Item -Path $runLogPath).Length } else { 0 }

    $result = [ordered]@{
        session_id = $sessionId
        status = $status
        started_at_utc = $startUtc.ToString("o")
        finished_at_utc = $endUtc.ToString("o")
        duration_ms = $durationMs
        exit_code = $exitCode
        command = $TestCommand
        workspace_root = $resolvedRoot
        session_path = $resolvedSessionPath
        logs_path = $logsPath
        tmp_path = $tmpPath
        artifacts_path = $artifactsPath
        run_log = $runLogPath
        report_path = $reportPath
        report_json = $reportJsonPath
        tmp_file_count = $tmpStats.file_count
        tmp_total_bytes = $tmpStats.total_bytes
        artifact_file_count = $artifactStats.file_count
        artifact_total_bytes = $artifactStats.total_bytes
        log_total_bytes = $logBytes
    }
    $result | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 | Set-Content -Path $resultPath -Encoding UTF8
    $result | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 | Set-Content -Path $reportJsonPath -Encoding UTF8

    $reportLines = @(
        "# Test Session Report",
        "",
        ("- Session ID: {0}" -f $sessionId),
        ("- Status: {0}" -f $status),
        ("- Exit Code: {0}" -f $exitCode),
        ("- Started At (UTC): {0}" -f $result.started_at_utc),
        ("- Finished At (UTC): {0}" -f $result.finished_at_utc),
        ("- Duration (ms): {0}" -f $durationMs),
        ('- Command: `{0}`' -f $TestCommand),
        ('- Workspace Root: `{0}`' -f $resolvedRoot),
        ('- Session Path: `{0}`' -f $resolvedSessionPath),
        ('- Run Log: `{0}`' -f $runLogPath),
        ("- TMP Files: {0} ({1} bytes)" -f $tmpStats.file_count, $tmpStats.total_bytes),
        ("- Artifact Files: {0} ({1} bytes)" -f $artifactStats.file_count, $artifactStats.total_bytes),
        ("- Log Size (bytes): {0}" -f $logBytes),
        ""
    )
    ($reportLines -join [Environment]::NewLine) | Set-Content -Path $reportPath -Encoding UTF8

    $historyRecord = [ordered]@{
        session_id = $sessionId
        status = $status
        exit_code = $exitCode
        duration_ms = $durationMs
        started_at_utc = $result.started_at_utc
        finished_at_utc = $result.finished_at_utc
        command = $TestCommand
        workspace_root = $resolvedRoot
        session_path = $resolvedSessionPath
        report_path = $reportPath
        run_log = $runLogPath
    }
    ($historyRecord | ConvertTo-Json -Compress) | Add-Content -Path $historyPath -Encoding UTF8

            if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($line)) {
                continue

            }
        }

    (Get-Content -Path $reportPath -Raw) | Set-Content -Path $latestReportPath -Encoding UTF8

    $env:TEMP = $previousTemp
    $env:TMPDIR = $previousTmpDir
    $env:TEST_SESSION_DIR = $previousSessionDir
    $env:TEST_LOG_DIR = $previousLogDir
    $env:TEST_TMP_DIR = $previousTmpVar
    $env:TEST_ARTIFACTS_DIR = $previousArtifactsDir
}

Write-Output ("SessionPath={0}" -f $resolvedSessionPath)
Write-Output ("RunLog={0}" -f $runLogPath)
Write-Output ("ArtifactsDir={0}" -f $artifactsPath)
Write-Output ("Report={0}" -f $reportPath)
Write-Output ("History={0}" -f $historyPath)
Write-Output ("Summary={0}" -f $summaryPath)
Write-Output ("LatestReport={0}" -f $latestReportPath)

        $lines += "| - | - | - | - | - | - |"
    }

    return ($lines -join [Environment]::NewLine)
}

$previousTmp = $env:TMP
$previousTemp = $env:TEMP
$previousTmpDir = $env:TMPDIR
$previousSessionDir = $env:TEST_SESSION_DIR
$previousLogDir = $env:TEST_LOG_DIR
$previousTmpVar = $env:TEST_TMP_DIR
$previousArtifactsDir = $env:TEST_ARTIFACTS_DIR

$env:TMP = $tmpPath
$env:TEMP = $tmpPath
$env:TMPDIR = $tmpPath
$env:TEST_SESSION_DIR = $resolvedSessionPath
$env:TEST_LOG_DIR = $logsPath
$env:TEST_TMP_DIR = $tmpPath
$env:TEST_ARTIFACTS_DIR = $artifactsPath

$startUtc = (Get-Date).ToUniversalTime()
$global:LASTEXITCODE = $null
$exitCode = 1

"[{0}] Running command: {1}" -f (Get-Date).ToString("s"), $commandLine | Set-Content -Path $runLogPath -Encoding UTF8

Push-Location -Path $resolvedRoot
try {
    cmd.exe /d /s /c $TestCommand 2>&1 | ForEach-Object {
        $line = $_.ToString()
        Write-Output $line
        Add-RunLogLine -Line $line
    }

    if ($null -ne $LASTEXITCODE) {
        $exitCode = [int]$LASTEXITCODE
    }
    elseif ($?) {
        $exitCode = 0
    }
    else {
        $exitCode = 1
    }
}
catch {
    $errorText = ($_ | Out-String).TrimEnd()
    if (-not [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($errorText)) {
        Write-Output $errorText
        Add-RunLogLine -Line $errorText
    }
    $exitCode = 1
}
finally {
    Pop-Location

    $endUtc = (Get-Date).ToUniversalTime()
    $durationMs = [math]::Round(($endUtc - $startUtc).TotalMilliseconds)
    $status = if ($exitCode -eq 0) { "PASS" } else { "FAIL" }
    $tmpStats = Get-DirectoryStats -Path $tmpPath
    $artifactStats = Get-DirectoryStats -Path $artifactsPath
    $logBytes = if (Test-Path -Path $runLogPath) { (Get-Item -Path $runLogPath).Length } else { 0 }

    $result = [ordered]@{
        session_id = $sessionId
        status = $status
        started_at_utc = $startUtc.ToString("o")
        finished_at_utc = $endUtc.ToString("o")
        duration_ms = $durationMs
        exit_code = $exitCode
        command = $TestCommand
        workspace_root = $resolvedRoot
        session_path = $resolvedSessionPath
        logs_path = $logsPath
        tmp_path = $tmpPath
        artifacts_path = $artifactsPath
        run_log = $runLogPath
        report_path = $reportPath
        report_json = $reportJsonPath
        tmp_file_count = $tmpStats.file_count
        tmp_total_bytes = $tmpStats.total_bytes
        artifact_file_count = $artifactStats.file_count
        artifact_total_bytes = $artifactStats.total_bytes
        log_total_bytes = $logBytes
    }
    $result | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 | Set-Content -Path $resultPath -Encoding UTF8
    $result | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 | Set-Content -Path $reportJsonPath -Encoding UTF8

    $reportLines = @(
        "# Test Session Report",
        "",
        ("- Session ID: {0}" -f $sessionId),
        ("- Status: {0}" -f $status),
        ("- Exit Code: {0}" -f $exitCode),
        ("- Started At (UTC): {0}" -f $result.started_at_utc),
        ("- Finished At (UTC): {0}" -f $result.finished_at_utc),
        ("- Duration (ms): {0}" -f $durationMs),
        ('- Command: `{0}`' -f $TestCommand),
        ('- Workspace Root: `{0}`' -f $resolvedRoot),
        ('- Session Path: `{0}`' -f $resolvedSessionPath),
        ('- Run Log: `{0}`' -f $runLogPath),
        ("- TMP Files: {0} ({1} bytes)" -f $tmpStats.file_count, $tmpStats.total_bytes),
        ("- Artifact Files: {0} ({1} bytes)" -f $artifactStats.file_count, $artifactStats.total_bytes),
        ("- Log Size (bytes): {0}" -f $logBytes),
        ""
    )
    ($reportLines -join [Environment]::NewLine) | Set-Content -Path $reportPath -Encoding UTF8

    $historyRecord = [ordered]@{
        session_id = $sessionId
        status = $status
        exit_code = $exitCode
        duration_ms = $durationMs
        started_at_utc = $result.started_at_utc
        finished_at_utc = $result.finished_at_utc
        command = $TestCommand
        workspace_root = $resolvedRoot
        session_path = $resolvedSessionPath
        report_path = $reportPath
        run_log = $runLogPath
    }
    ($historyRecord | ConvertTo-Json -Compress) | Add-Content -Path $historyPath -Encoding UTF8

    $historyItems = @()
    if (Test-Path -Path $historyPath) {
        foreach ($line in (Get-Content -Path $historyPath -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)) {
            if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($line)) {
                continue
            }

            try {
                $historyItems += ($line | ConvertFrom-Json)
            }
            catch {
            }
        }
    }

    (Build-SummaryMarkdown -HistoryItems $historyItems) | Set-Content -Path $summaryPath -Encoding UTF8
    (Get-Content -Path $reportPath -Raw) | Set-Content -Path $latestReportPath -Encoding UTF8

    $env:TMP = $previousTmp
    $env:TEMP = $previousTemp
    $env:TMPDIR = $previousTmpDir
    $env:TEST_SESSION_DIR = $previousSessionDir
    $env:TEST_LOG_DIR = $previousLogDir
    $env:TEST_TMP_DIR = $previousTmpVar
    $env:TEST_ARTIFACTS_DIR = $previousArtifactsDir
}

Write-Output ("SessionPath={0}" -f $resolvedSessionPath)
Write-Output ("RunLog={0}" -f $runLogPath)
Write-Output ("ArtifactsDir={0}" -f $artifactsPath)
Write-Output ("Report={0}" -f $reportPath)
Write-Output ("History={0}" -f $historyPath)
Write-Output ("Summary={0}" -f $summaryPath)
Write-Output ("LatestReport={0}" -f $latestReportPath)

exit $exitCode

  13: def create_task_run_record(root: Path, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
  14:     ensure_store(root)
  15:     task_id = str(payload.get("task_id") or "").strip()
  16:     if not task_id:
  17:         raise RuntimeError("task_id required")
  18:     paths = task_run_paths(root, task_id)
  19:     with _STORE_LOCK:
  20:         record = {
  21:             "record_type": "task_run",
  22:             "schema_version": _SCHEMA_VERSION,
  23:             "task_id": task_id,
  24:             "session_id": str(payload.get("session_id") or ""),
  25:             "agent_name": str(payload.get("agent_name") or ""),
  26:             "agent_search_root": str(payload.get("agent_search_root") or ""),
  27:             "default_agents_root": str(payload.get("default_agents_root") or ""),
  28:             "target_path": str(payload.get("target_path") or ""),
  29:             "status": str(payload.get("status") or "pending"),
  30:             "message": str(payload.get("message") or ""),
  31:             "command_json": str(payload.get("command_json") or "[]"),
  32:             "command_display": str(payload.get("command_display") or "[]"),
  33:             "start_at": str(payload.get("start_at") or ""),
  34:             "end_at": str(payload.get("end_at") or ""),
  35:             "duration_ms": payload.get("duration_ms"),
  36:             "stdout_ref": paths["stdout"].as_posix(),
  37:             "stderr_ref": paths["stderr"].as_posix(),
  38:             "trace_ref": paths["trace"].as_posix(),
  39:             "events_ref": paths["events"].as_posix(),
  40:             "summary": str(payload.get("summary") or ""),
  41:             "ref": normalize_work_record_ref(
  42:                 root,
  43:                 str(payload.get("ref") or paths["summary"].as_posix()),
  44:                 task_id=task_id,
  45:             ),
  46:             "created_at": str(payload.get("created_at") or _now_ts()),
  47:             "updated_at": str(payload.get("updated_at") or payload.get("created_at") or _now_ts()),
  48:             "event_seq": 0,
  49:         }
  50:         _write_json(paths["run"], record)

  59: def get_task_run_record(root: Path, task_id: str) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
  60:     ensure_store(root)
  61:     record = _load_json_dict(run_record_path(root, task_id))
  62:     if not record:
  63:         return None
  64:     stdout_ref = str(record.get("stdout_ref") or "")
  65:     stderr_ref = str(record.get("stderr_ref") or "")
  66:     record["stdout"] = Path(stdout_ref).read_text(encoding="utf-8") if stdout_ref and Path(stdout_ref).exists() else ""
  67:     record["stderr"] = Path(stderr_ref).read_text(encoding="utf-8") if stderr_ref and Path(stderr_ref).exists() else ""
  68:     return record

  70: 
  71: def list_task_run_records(root: Path, *, session_id: str = "", limit: int = 200) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
  72:     ensure_store(root)
  73:     rows = _record_index.list_task_run_records_from_index(root, session_id=session_id, limit=limit)
  74:     if rows:
  75:         return rows
  76:     fallback: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
  77:     for path in sorted(runs_root(root).glob("*/run.json"), key=lambda item: item.as_posix().lower()):
  78:         record = _load_json_dict(path)
  79:         if not record:
  80:             continue
  81:         if session_id and str(record.get("session_id") or "") != str(session_id or ""):
  82:             continue
  83:         fallback.append(record)
  84:     fallback.sort(key=lambda item: str(item.get("created_at") or ""))
  85:     return fallback[: max(1, min(int(limit), 2000))]

  88: def update_task_run_record(root: Path, task_id: str, patch: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
  89:     ensure_store(root)
  90:     with _STORE_LOCK:
  91:         record = _load_json_dict(run_record_path(root, task_id))
  92:         if not record:
  93:             raise RuntimeError("task run not found")
  94:         record.update(dict(patch or {}))
  95:         record["updated_at"] = str((patch or {}).get("updated_at") or _now_ts())
  96:         _write_json(run_record_path(root, task_id), record)
  97:         _sync_task_run_index(root, task_id)
  98:         return record

执行要求：

[2026-03-27T23:00:03+08:00] {"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_1","type":"command_execution","command":""C:\\WINDOWS\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe" -Command 'Get-Content -Raw AGENTS.md'","aggregated_output":"# Repository Guidelines

## 运行开关（顶部手动切换）
1. `DIALOGUE_RETRO_SWITCH: ON`
   - `ON`: 每轮对话结束后允许自动执行“复盘增量记录”（偏好变化、需求假设、验证动作）。
   - `OFF`: 禁止自动更新复盘相关文件；仅在用户明确指令时更新：
     - `state/session-snapshot.md`
     - `state/user-preferences.md`
     - `logs/runs/*.md`

## 启动读取顺序
1. 顶层治理入口固定先读 `AGENTS.md`。
2. 默认会话按以下顺序继续读取：
   - `.codex/SOUL.md`
   - `.codex/USER.md`
   - `.codex/MEMORY.md`
   - `.codex/memory/全局记忆总览.md`
   - `.codex/memory/YYYY-MM/记忆总览.md`
   - `.codex/memory/YYYY-MM/YYYY-MM-DD.md`
3. 当日日记缺失时，先在对应 `YYYY-MM/` 目录创建当日日记，再进入正式工作。
4. 工作日切后的首轮工作，先检查“昨日记忆”是否已归档到对应 `.codex/memory/YYYY-MM/记忆总览.md`。
5. 工作月切后的首轮工作，先检查“上月记忆总览”是否已归档到 `.codex/memory/全局记忆总览.md`。

## 三层职责边界
- `.codex/`：agent 工作记忆、内部工作文档、本地技能入口（如 `.codex/skills/*/SKILL.md`）。
- `state/`：产品运行态、运行数据库、会话快照与复盘态。
- `logs/`：运行与审计留痕、执行记录、证据归档。
- 禁止把 `.codex/MEMORY.md`、`.codex/memory/**/*.md` 当成产品运行态、配置文件或审计日志使用。

## Project Structure & Module Organization
- `src/workflow_app/`：核心源码目录（服务端、CLI、运行时与前端模块源码）。
- `scripts/`：入口与运维脚本目录（对 `src/workflow_app` 的兼容启动包装 + 工具脚本）。
- `scripts/acceptance/`：门禁验收脚本目录。
- `docs/workflow/`：需求、门禁和证据矩阵文档，先读这里再改流程。
- `logs/`：运行与审计留痕。重点子目录：`events/`（JSONL 事件流）、`runs/`（执行记录）、`decisions/`（决策日志）、`summaries/`（汇总）。
- `state/`：运行态数据（如 `state/workflow.db`、`session-snapshot.md`、`change-log.md`）。
- `metrics/` 与 `incidents/`：性能基线和故障记录。

## Build, Test, and Development Commands
- `.\run_workflow.bat`：Windows 一键启动（调用 `scripts/launch_workflow.ps1` 并打开页面）。
- `powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/launch_workflow.ps1 -OpenBrowser`：可控启动（支持 `-BindHost/-Port/-SkipBackfill`）。
- `python scripts/workflow_web_server.py --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8090`：仅启动 Web 服务（用于本地接口联调）。
- `python scripts/workflow_entry_cli.py --mode status`：刷新并查看待分析/待训练状态。
- `python scripts/workflow_entry_cli.py --mode backfill`：将 `logs/events/*.jsonl` 回填到 SQLite。
- `python scripts/acceptance/run_acceptance_workflow_gate.py --root . --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8098`：执行 workflow 门禁验收。

## Coding Style & Naming Conventions
- Python 使用 4 空格缩进，优先类型标注与 `pathlib.Path`，函数名使用 `snake_case`。
- JavaScript 保持 ES 语法与 `camelCase` 变量命名；常量使用 `UPPER_SNAKE_CASE`。
- 新增脚本命名遵循 `scripts/<action>_<target>.py`，日志文件遵循 `logs/runs/<topic>-YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS.md`。

## Testing Guidelines
- 当前主测试入口是门禁脚本（非 pytest 套件）。改动 API/流程时，优先补充 `run_acceptance_workflow_gate.py` 对应 case。
- 验收结果需落盘到 `logs/runs/`，并在必要时更新 `docs/workflow/验收证据矩阵-Phase0.md`。
- 最低回归建议：`healthz` 可用、会话创建成功、任务可中断并可重试、训练链路事件可查询。

## Architecture & Workflow Notes
- 典型链路：`workflow_web_server.py` 接收请求 -> `task_agent_runner.py` 执行任务 -> 事件与消息写入 `state/workflow.db` 与 `logs/events/*.jsonl`。
- 前端资源由后端直接托管，核心交互脚本已拆分到 `src/workflow_app/web_client/*.js`（由 `workflow_web_server.py` 运行时拼接），修改 UI 时需同步检查 API 字段兼容性。
- 训练相关状态通过队列与事件表回放，调试时优先对照 `logs/runs/` 报告与 `state/change-log.md`。

## Commit & Pull Request Guidelines
- 当前工作区未包含 `.git` 历史，建议统一采用 Conventional Commits：`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `chore:`。
- 提交信息建议包含作用域，如：`fix(workflow): block $root traversal on write targets`。
- PR 至少包含：变更目的、影响范围、验证命令、关键日志路径；涉及 UI 时附页面截图。
- 单个 PR 建议聚焦单一主题（例如仅修复路径安全或仅调整训练队列 UI），避免把流程改造与文档重写混在一次提交中。

## Security & Configuration Tips
- 真实模型调用依赖环境变量：`WORKFLOW_AGENT_BASE_URL`、`WORKFLOW_AGENT_API_KEY`、`WORKFLOW_AGENT_MODEL`。
- 严禁提交密钥或包含敏感信息的 trace；提交前检查 `logs/` 与 `state/` 新增文件。
- 所有写入路径必须限制在 `agent_search_root` 内，保持 `$root` 越界拦截行为不回退。

## PM Continuous Maintenance
- 仅当 `DIALOGUE_RETRO_SWITCH: ON` 时，才自动写入每轮复盘增量；`OFF` 时只读不写，除非用户明确要求更新。
- 用户偏好与需求假设统一维护在 `state/user-preferences.md`（单一事实源）。
- 每次更新执行快照（如 `state/session-snapshot.md`、`logs/runs/*.md`）时，不重复粘贴全文，只追加引用：`preference_ref: state/user-preferences.md` 与本次增量观察。
- `User Preferences` 只记录可观察偏好，例如：响应风格、交付粒度、容错策略、优先级倾向；避免记录无关隐私。
- `Need Hypotheses` 使用固定格式：`Observation -> Inference -> Validation Action -> Confidence(High/Med/Low)`。
- 需求揣测采用“行为心理线索 + JTBD”方法：从措辞、催促频率、验收关注点推断深层目标，再通过下一轮需求确认闭环。
- 禁止把推测当事实；任何心理层推断都要在后续对话中显式求证并允许用户否定。
- `.codex/MEMORY.md` 只维护记忆规范；禁止把具体轮次总结直接写进该文件。
- `.codex/memory/全局记忆总览.md` 只归档已闭月的月度总结；当前活动月份只保留索引，不复制当月当日增量。
- `.codex/memory/YYYY-MM/记忆总览.md` 只归档截至昨日的日级摘要；今日总结仅写入当日日记，待日切后再汇总。
- 每轮工作结束后，都要向 `.codex/memory/YYYY-MM/YYYY-MM-DD.md` 追加一条带时间戳的本轮总结。
- 若发生日切但月未切，先补齐“昨日 -> 月度总览”的归档检查，再继续工作。
- 若发生月切，先补齐“昨日 -> 对应月度总览”与“上月总览 -> 全局总览”的归档检查，再继续工作。

### Snapshot Addendum Template
```md
- preference_ref: state/user-preferences.md
- delta_observation: <本次新增观察>
- delta_validation: <下一轮验证动作>
```



4. 在正式发布成功后同步绑定角色详情来源。

## Purpose
- This file is the top-level memory spec for the current workspace.
- Keep concrete round summaries out of this file; write them into daily memory files only.
- Treat `.codex/` as agent memory and internal guidance, never as product runtime state.

## Required Read Order
1. `AGENTS.md`
2. `.codex/SOUL.md`
3. `.codex/USER.md`
4. `.codex/MEMORY.md`
5. `.codex/memory/全局记忆总览.md`
6. `.codex/memory/YYYY-MM/记忆总览.md`
7. `.codex/memory/YYYY-MM/YYYY-MM-DD.md`

## Directory Model
- Global overview: `.codex/memory/全局记忆总览.md`
- Monthly overview: `.codex/memory/YYYY-MM/记忆总览.md`
- Daily memory: `.codex/memory/YYYY-MM/YYYY-MM-DD.md`

## Write Rules
- Every work round ends with one timestamped summary appended to the current daily memory file.
- Each daily entry should prefer a structured recall format: `topic`, `context`, `actions`, `decisions`, `validation`, `artifacts`, `next`.
- The current day's summary stays only in the daily file until the next day starts.
- The current month's overview stores only archived daily summaries up to yesterday.
- The global overview stores only archived monthly summaries for closed months.

## Daily Entry Detail Standard
- `topic`: what this round was mainly about.
- `context`: why the round happened, including the trigger or detected gap.
- `actions`: what was changed, created, migrated, or checked.
- `decisions`: rules or conclusions that affect later work.
- `validation`: commands, checks, and observed outcomes.
- `artifacts`: the most important files or directories touched.
- `next`: follow-up work, deferred checks, or rollover conditions.
- Keep entries concise but complete enough that a later reader can reconstruct the round without reopening a large number of unrelated files.

## Rollover Checks
- Day rollover: before the first round of a new day, verify yesterday's daily memory is summarized in the matching monthly overview.
- Month rollover: before the first round of a new month, verify the previous month's overview is summarized in the global overview.
- If a required overview entry is missing, archive it first and then continue normal work.

## Validation Commands
- `python scripts/manage_codex_memory.py status --root .`
- `python scripts/manage_codex_memory.py verify-rollups --root .`
- `python scripts/manage_codex_memory.py append --root . --summary "<round summary>"`
- `python scripts/manage_codex_memory.py append --root . --topic "<topic>" --context "<context>" --actions "<action1|action2>" --decisions "<decision1|decision2>" --validation "<check1|check2>"`

description: Manage local test execution with mandatory timestamped sessions under ./.test. Use when Codex is asked to run any tests (unit/integration/e2e/CI checks) so execution logs, temporary files, and generated artifacts are captured in ./.test/timestamped-session. Also use when cleaning test session files.
---

# Test Session Manager

## Core Workflow

1. Start a test session before any test command.
2. Create `./.test/<timestamp>/` with `logs/`, `tmp/`, and `artifacts/`.
3. Run tests through the wrapper script so stdout/stderr and metadata are recorded.
4. Auto-generate session report files and append global history for monitoring.
5. Place all temporary and intermediate outputs in the session directory.
6. Use the cleanup script to remove old or unnecessary sessions while preserving reports by default.

Never run tests directly when this skill applies. Always use `scripts/run-test-in-session.ps1`.

## Commands

- Create session only:
  - `powershell.exe -File .agents/skills/test-session-manager/scripts/start-test-session.ps1 -RootPath .`
- Run tests with logging and isolated temp:
  - `powershell.exe -File .agents/skills/test-session-manager/scripts/run-test-in-session.ps1 -RootPath . -TestCommand "pytest -q"`
  - `powershell.exe -File .agents/skills/test-session-manager/scripts/run-test-in-session.ps1 -RootPath . -TestCommand "npm test -- --runInBand"`
- Cleanup:
  - Remove one session: `powershell.exe -File .agents/skills/test-session-manager/scripts/cleanup-test-sessions.ps1 -RootPath . -SessionId 20260215-223000-123`
  - Keep latest N sessions: `powershell.exe -File .agents/skills/test-session-manager/scripts/cleanup-test-sessions.ps1 -RootPath . -KeepLatest 3`
  - Remove all sessions but keep reports: `powershell.exe -File .agents/skills/test-session-manager/scripts/cleanup-test-sessions.ps1 -RootPath . -All`
  - Remove all sessions and reports: `powershell.exe -File .agents/skills/test-session-manager/scripts/cleanup-test-sessions.ps1 -RootPath . -All -IncludeReports`

## Output Contract

- Session root: `./.test/<timestamp>/`
- Subdirectories:
  - `logs/` for execution logs
  - `tmp/` for temporary/intermediate files
  - `artifacts/` for framework outputs (coverage, junit xml, reports)
- Metadata files:
  - `session.json`
  - `command.txt`
  - `result.json`
  - `report.json`
  - `report.md`
  - `logs/test-run.log`
- Global report files:
  - `.test/reports/history.jsonl` (append-only history)
  - `.test/reports/summary.md` (latest 20 sessions overview)
  - `.test/reports/latest-report.md` (latest session report)

## Environment Variables Exposed During Test Run

- `TEST_SESSION_DIR`
- `TEST_LOG_DIR`
- `TEST_TMP_DIR`
- `TEST_ARTIFACTS_DIR`
- `TMP`
- `TEMP`
- `TMPDIR`

Use these variables to route framework output into the current timestamped session.

## Cleanup Rules

- Historical test sessions are preserved by default until explicit cleanup.
- Prefer `-KeepLatest` for routine cleanup.
- Use `-OlderThanDays` to prune stale sessions.
- `-All` removes session folders but keeps `.test/reports` by default for monitoring continuity.
- Add `-IncludeReports` only when you intentionally want to delete monitoring history.

## Scripts

- `scripts/start-test-session.ps1`: create `./.test/<timestamp>/` session directory.
- `scripts/run-test-in-session.ps1`: run tests with log capture, temp isolation, and automatic report generation.
- `scripts/cleanup-test-sessions.ps1`: cleanup session directories by ID, retention, age, or all (reports preserved unless `-IncludeReports`).

class=\"card\">\n      <h2>3. 成因拆解</h2>\n      <ol>\n        <li><strong>并发锁模型已经重构。</strong> 当前实现不再把会话锁直接存成 <code>threading.Lock</code>，而是包装成 <code>SessionLockEntry</code>，用于保存 <code>lock</code> 与 <code>ref_count</code>。</li>\n        <li><strong>任务 worker 仍残留旧接口写法。</strong> <code>execute_task_worker()</code> 没有复用新的 <code>acquire_generation_slot()</code> / <code>release_generation_slot()</code>，而是保留了旧时代的直接加锁逻辑，所以第一次进入 worker 就会在 <code>lock.acquire()</code> 处报错。</li>\n        <li><strong>异常发生点早于任务执行。</strong> 代码在 <code>subprocess.Popen(...)</code> 之前就抛错，因此不会产生 agent 输出，也不会进入正常 running/success 流程；这和真实证据里“只有 user message、没有 assistant message、trace 为空”完全一致。</li>\n        <li><strong>这不是 agent 专属问题。</strong> 失败点位于通用 runtime 编排层，不在 <code>workflow_tester</code> 的 AGENTS、提示词或模型调用内部，所以任何通过 <code>C:/work/J-Agents/.output/tasks/execute</code> 发起的任务都具备同样风险。</li>\n      </ol>\n    </section>\n\n    <section class=\"card\">\n      <h2>4. 复现条件</h2>\n      <h3>4.1 真实接口复现</h3>\n      <ol>\n        <li>创建任意有效会话，例如本次真实会话 <code>sess-web-20260327-222529-1b13b1</code>。</li>\n        <li>向 <code>C:/work/J-Agents/.output/tasks/execute</code> 发起任务执行请求。</li>\n        <li>轮询 <code>C:/work/J-Agents/.output/tasks/<task_id></code> 或查看任务 trace。</li>\n        <li>观察结果：任务会在约 <code>102ms</code> 内直接失败，摘要为 <code>AttributeError: 'SessionLockEntry' object has no attribute 'acquire'</code>。</li>\n      </ol>\n      <h3>4.2 源码最小复现</h3>\n      <ol>\n        <li>导入当前仓库的 <section class=\"card\">\n      <h2>5. 修复范围</h2>\n      <ol>\n        <li><strong>核心代码修复。</strong> 收口 <code>src/workflow_app/server/services/task_orchestration.py</code>，将 <code>execute_task_worker()</code> 改为和聊天接口一致的 lease 模式：\n          <ul>\n            <li>优先方案：直接复用 <code>acquire_generation_slot()</code> / <code>release_generation_slot()</code>。</li>\n            <li>若不复用，也至少要改成对 <code>entry.lock</code> 加锁，并保证只在真正 acquire 成功后才做对称 release。</li>\n          </ul>\n        </li>\n        <li><strong>清理逻辑一起修。</strong> 当前 finally 段仍把 <code>SessionLockEntry</code> 当原生锁释放；按最小复现推演，首个异常之后还会继续触发：\n          <ul>\n            <li><code>state.generation_semaphore.release()</code> 在未成功 acquire 的情况下被错误执行；</li>\n            <li><code>lock.release()</code> 会再次命中 <li><strong>运行副本同步。</strong> 当前 <code>src</code>、<code>.running/prod</code>、<code>.running/test</code> 三份文件同 hash，说明部署副本同样带病；修复后需要同步到运行态并重启对应环境。</li>\n        <li><strong>门禁补强。</strong> 至少补以下脚本的成功断言，而不是只把 <code>failed</code> 当作“已结束”：\n          <ul>\n            <li><code>scripts/acceptance/run_acceptance_workflow_gate.py:51-58</code> 当前把 <code>success/failed/interrupted</code> 一并视为 <li><code>scripts/acceptance/run_acceptance_policy_cache_ac31_ac35.py:56-63</code> 也把 <code>failed</code> 视为 done，缺少“至少一条任务成功返回 assistant 输出”的硬断言。</li>\n          </ul>\n        </li>\n      </ol>\n    </section>\n\n    <section class=\"card\">\n      <h2>6. 修复优先级建议</h2>\n      <ol>\n        <li>先修 <code>task_orchestration.py</code> 的 lease/cleanup 对称性，恢复   21: def _decref_session_lock(state: RuntimeState, session_id: str, lock: threading.Lock) -> None:
  22:     with state.session_lock_guard:
  23:         entry = state.session_locks.get(session_id)
  24:         if entry is None or entry.lock is not lock:
  25:             return
  26:         entry.ref_count = max(0, int(entry.ref_count or 0) - 1)
  27:         if entry.ref_count <= 0 and not entry.lock.locked():
  28:             state.session_locks.pop(session_id, None)
  29: 
  30: 
  31: def session_lock_for(state: RuntimeState, session_id: str) -> SessionLockEntry:
  32:     with state.session_lock_guard:
  33:         entry = state.session_locks.get(session_id)
  34:         if entry is None:
  35:             entry = SessionLockEntry()
  36:             state.session_locks[session_id] = entry
  37:         entry.ref_count += 1
  38:         return entry
  39: 
  40: 
  41: def acquire_generation_slot(state: RuntimeState, session_id: str) -> GenerationLease:
  42:     entry = session_lock_for(state, session_id)
  43:     lock = entry.lock
  44:     lock.acquire()
  45:     if not state.generation_semaphore.acquire(blocking=False):
  46:         lock.release()
  47:         _decref_session_lock(state, session_id, lock)
  48:         raise ConcurrencyLimitError(
  49:             f"generation concurrency limit reached ({MAX_GENERATION_CONCURRENCY})"
  50:         )
  51:     return GenerationLease(session_id=session_id, lock=lock)
  52: 
  53: 
  54: def release_generation_slot(state: RuntimeState, lease: GenerationLease | None) -> None:
  55:     if lease is None:
  56:         return
  57:     lock = lease.lock
  58:     state.generation_semaphore.release()
  59:     lock.release()
  60:     _decref_session_lock(state, lease.session_id, lock)

  68: def redact_command(parts: list[str]) -> list[str]:
  69:     out: list[str] = []
  70:     for item in parts:
  71:         text = str(item)
  72:         lower = text.lower()
  73:         if any(key in lower for key in ["api_key", "token", "secret", "password"]):
  74:             out.append("***")
  75:             continue
  76:         if text.startswith("sk-"):
  77:             out.append("***")
  78:             continue
  79:         out.append(text)
  80:     return out

function Add-RunLogLine {
    param([string]$Line)

    Add-Content -Path $runLogPath -Value $Line -Encoding UTF8
}

function Get-DirectoryStats {
    param([string]$Path)

    if (-not (Test-Path -Path $Path)) {
        return [ordered]@{
            file_count = 0
            total_bytes = 0
        }
    }

    $files = @(Get-ChildItem -Path $Path -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
    $totalBytes = 0
    foreach ($file in $files) {
        $totalBytes += $file.Length
    }

    return [ordered]@{
        file_count = $files.Count
        total_bytes = $totalBytes
    }
}

function Build-SummaryMarkdown {
    param([object[]]$HistoryItems)

    $lines = @(
        "# Test Report Summary",
        "",
        ("- Generated At (UTC): {0}" -f (Get-Date).ToUniversalTime().ToString("o")),
        "",
        "## Last 20 Sessions",
        "",
        "| Session | Status | Exit | Duration(ms) | Started(UTC) | Command |",
        "|---|---:|---:|---:|---|---|"
    )

    $recent = @($HistoryItems | Sort-Object started_at_utc -Descending | Select-Object -First 20)
    foreach ($item in $recent) {
        $commandText = [string]$item.command
        $commandText = $commandText.Replace("|", "\\|")
        if ($commandText.Length -gt 80) {
            $commandText = $commandText.Substring(0, 77) + "..."
        }

        $lines += ("| {0} | {1} | {2} | {3} | {4} | {5} |" -f `
            $item.session_id, $item.status, $item.exit_code, $item.duration_ms, $item.started_at_utc, $commandText)
    }

    if ($recent.Count -eq 0) {
        $lines += "| - | - | - | - | - | - |"
    }

    return ($lines -join [Environment]::NewLine)
}

$previousTmp = $env:TMP
$previousTemp = $env:TEMP
$previousTmpDir = $env:TMPDIR
$previousSessionDir = $env:TEST_SESSION_DIR
$previousLogDir = $env:TEST_LOG_DIR
$previousTmpVar = $env:TEST_TMP_DIR
$previousArtifactsDir = $env:TEST_ARTIFACTS_DIR

$env:TMP = $tmpPath
$env:TEMP = $tmpPath
$env:TMPDIR = $tmpPath
$env:TEST_SESSION_DIR = $resolvedSessionPath
$env:TEST_LOG_DIR = $logsPath
$env:TEST_TMP_DIR = $tmpPath
$env:TEST_ARTIFACTS_DIR = $artifactsPath

$startUtc = (Get-Date).ToUniversalTime()
$global:LASTEXITCODE = $null
$exitCode = 1

"[{0}] Running command: {1}" -f (Get-Date).ToString("s"), $commandLine | Set-Content -Path $runLogPath -Encoding UTF8

Push-Location -Path $resolvedRoot
try {
    cmd.exe /d /s /c $TestCommand 2>&1 | ForEach-Object {
        $line = $_.ToString()
        Write-Output $line
        Add-RunLogLine -Line $line
    }

    if ($null -ne $LASTEXITCODE) {
        $exitCode = [int]$LASTEXITCODE
    }
    elseif ($?) {
        $exitCode = 0
    }
    else {
        $exitCode = 1
    }
}
catch {
    $errorText = ($_ | Out-String).TrimEnd()
    if (-not [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($errorText)) {
        Write-Output $errorText
        Add-RunLogLine -Line $errorText
    }
    $exitCode = 1
}
finally {
    Pop-Location

    $endUtc = (Get-Date).ToUniversalTime()
    $durationMs = [math]::Round(($endUtc - $startUtc).TotalMilliseconds)
    $status = if ($exitCode -eq 0) { "PASS" } else { "FAIL" }
    $tmpStats = Get-DirectoryStats -Path $tmpPath
    $artifactStats = Get-DirectoryStats -Path $artifactsPath
    $logBytes = if (Test-Path -Path $runLogPath) { (Get-Item -Path $runLogPath).Length } else { 0 }

    $result = [ordered]@{
        session_id = $sessionId
        status = $status
        started_at_utc = $startUtc.ToString("o")
        finished_at_utc = $endUtc.ToString("o")
        duration_ms = $durationMs
        exit_code = $exitCode
        command = $TestCommand
        workspace_root = $resolvedRoot
        session_path = $resolvedSessionPath
        logs_path = $logsPath
        tmp_path = $tmpPath
        artifacts_path = $artifactsPath
        run_log = $runLogPath
        report_path = $reportPath
        report_json = $reportJsonPath
        tmp_file_count = $tmpStats.file_count
        tmp_total_bytes = $tmpStats.total_bytes
        artifact_file_count = $artifactStats.file_count
        artifact_total_bytes = $artifactStats.total_bytes
        log_total_bytes = $logBytes
    }
    $result | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 | Set-Content -Path $resultPath -Encoding UTF8
    $result | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 | Set-Content -Path $reportJsonPath -Encoding UTF8

    $reportLines = @(
        "# Test Session Report",
        "",
        ("- Session ID: {0}" -f $sessionId),
        ("- Status: {0}" -f $status),
        ("- Exit Code: {0}" -f $exitCode),
        ("- Started At (UTC): {0}" -f $result.started_at_utc),
        ("- Finished At (UTC): {0}" -f $result.finished_at_utc),
        ("- Duration (ms): {0}" -f $durationMs),
        ('- Command: `{0}`' -f $TestCommand),
        ('- Workspace Root: `{0}`' -f $resolvedRoot),
        ('- Session Path: `{0}`' -f $resolvedSessionPath),
        ('- Run Log: `{0}`' -f $runLogPath),
        ("- TMP Files: {0} ({1} bytes)" -f $tmpStats.file_count, $tmpStats.total_bytes),
        ("- Artifact Files: {0} ({1} bytes)" -f $artifactStats.file_count, $artifactStats.total_bytes),
        ("- Log Size (bytes): {0}" -f $logBytes),
        ""
    )
    ($reportLines -join [Environment]::NewLine) | Set-Content -Path $reportPath -Encoding UTF8

    $historyRecord = [ordered]@{
        session_id = $sessionId
        status = $status
        exit_code = $exitCode
        duration_ms = $durationMs
        started_at_utc = $result.started_at_utc
        finished_at_utc = $result.finished_at_utc
        command = $TestCommand
        workspace_root = $resolvedRoot
        session_path = $resolvedSessionPath
        report_path = $reportPath
        run_log = $runLogPath
    }
    ($historyRecord | ConvertTo-Json -Compress) | Add-Content -Path $historyPath -Encoding UTF8

    $historyItems = @()
    if (Test-Path -Path $historyPath) {
        foreach ($line in (Get-Content -Path $historyPath -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)) {
            if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($line)) {
                continue
            }

            try {
                $historyItems += ($line | ConvertFrom-Json)
            }
            catch {
            }
        }
    }

    (Build-SummaryMarkdown -HistoryItems $historyItems) | Set-Content -Path $summaryPath -Encoding UTF8
    (Get-Content -Path $reportPath -Raw) | Set-Content -Path $latestReportPath -Encoding UTF8

    $env:TMP = $previousTmp
    $env:TEMP = $previousTemp
    $env:TMPDIR = $previousTmpDir
    $env:TEST_SESSION_DIR = $previousSessionDir
    $env:TEST_LOG_DIR = $previousLogDir
    $env:TEST_TMP_DIR = $previousTmpVar
    $env:TEST_ARTIFACTS_DIR = $previousArtifactsDir
}

Write-Output ("SessionPath={0}" -f $resolvedSessionPath)
Write-Output ("RunLog={0}" -f $runLogPath)
Write-Output ("ArtifactsDir={0}" -f $artifactsPath)
Write-Output ("Report={0}" -f $reportPath)
Write-Output ("History={0}" -f $historyPath)
Write-Output ("Summary={0}" -f $summaryPath)
Write-Output ("LatestReport={0}" -f $latestReportPath)

exit $exitCode

 153: def append_task_event(
 154:     root: Path,
 155:     task_id_text: str,
 156:     event_type: str,
 157:     payload: dict[str, Any],
 158: ) -> int:
 159:     return append_task_run_event_record(
 160:         root,
 161:         task_id_text,
 162:         {
 163:             "timestamp": iso_ts(now_local()),
 164:             "event_type": event_type,
 165:             "payload": dict(payload or {}),
 166:         },
 167:     )

 169: 
 170: def get_task_run(root: Path, task_id_text: str) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
 171:     out = get_task_run_record(root, task_id_text)
 172:     if not out:
 173:         return None
 174:     try:
 175:         out["command"] = json.loads(str(out.get("command_display") or "[]"))
 176:     except Exception:
 177:         out["command"] = []
 178:     return out

 181: def list_session_task_runs(root: Path, session_id: str, limit: int = 200) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
 182:     rows = list_task_run_records(root, session_id=session_id, limit=max(1, min(limit, 2000)))
 183:     out: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
 184:     for row in rows:

 187:             item["command"] = json.loads(str(item.get("command_display") or "[]"))
 188:         except Exception:

 190:         task_id_value = str(item.get("task_id") or "")
 191:         item["trace_available"] = bool(task_id_value and task_trace_file(root, task_id_value).exists())
 192:         out.append(item)

 290: def set_runtime_task(state: RuntimeState, runtime: TaskRuntime | None, task_id_text: str) -> None:
 291:     with state.task_runtime_lock:
 292:         if runtime is None:
 293:             state.active_tasks.pop(task_id_text, None)
 294:         else:
 295:             state.active_tasks[task_id_text] = runtime
 296: 
 297: 
 298: def get_runtime_task(state: RuntimeState, task_id_text: str) -> TaskRuntime | None:
 299:     with state.task_runtime_lock:
 300:         return state.active_tasks.get(task_id_text)
 301: 
 302: 
 303: def active_runtime_task_count(state: RuntimeState) -> int:
 304:     with state.task_runtime_lock:
 305:         return len(state.active_tasks)
 306: 
 307: 
 308: def has_session_runtime_task(state: RuntimeState, session_id: str) -> bool:
 309:     with state.task_runtime_lock:
 310:         return any(rt.session_id == session_id for rt in state.active_tasks.values())
 311: 
 312: 
 313: def training_workflow_has_running_task(root: Path, state: RuntimeState, workflow_id: str) -> bool:
 314:     workflow = get_training_workflow(root, workflow_id)
 315:     if not workflow:
 316:         return False
 317:     session_id = str(workflow.get("session_id") or "")
 318:     if session_id and has_session_runtime_task(state, session_id):
 319:         return True
 320:     analysis_id = str(workflow.get("analysis_id") or "")
 321:     if not analysis_id:
 322:         return False
 323:     task_record = get_training_task_record(root, analysis_id)
 324:     return str((task_record or {}).get("status") or "") == "running"

 178: def append_task_run_event_record(root: Path, task_id: str, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> int:
 179:     ensure_store(root)
 180:     with _STORE_LOCK:

 194:             "timestamp": str(payload.get("timestamp") or _now_ts()),
 195:             "event_type": str(payload.get("event_type") or ""),
 196:             "payload": row_payload,
 197:         }
 198:         _append_jsonl(run_events_path(root, task_id), row)
 199:         record["event_seq"] = next_id
 200:         record["updated_at"] = row["timestamp"]
 201:         _write_json(run_record_path(root, task_id), record)
 202:         _sync_task_run_index(root, task_id)
 203:         return next_id

from __future__ import annotations

import json
import shutil
import subprocess
import sys
from pathlib import Path

repo_root = Path('.').resolve()
sys.path.insert(0, str((repo_root / 'scripts' / 'acceptance').resolve()))
import run_acceptance_workflow_gate as gate  # type: ignore
from policy_cache_seed import upsert_policy_cache  # type: ignore

runtime_root = (repo_root / '.test' / 'runtime' / 'task-execute-lock-smoke').resolve()
if runtime_root.exists():
    shutil.rmtree(runtime_root, ignore_errors=True)
runtime_root.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
fixture_root = gate.write_agents_fixture(runtime_root)
upsert_policy_cache(
    runtime_root=runtime_root,
    workspace_root=fixture_root,
    specs=[
        {
            'agent_name': 'trainer',
            'role_profile': '你是训练执行助手。',
            'session_goal': '在职责边界内完成用户要求并输出可验证结果。',
            'duty_constraints': [
                '先复述任务目标与约束，再给执行步骤。',
                '输出必须包含可验证结果与回归检查点。',
                '仅在 agent_search_root 范围内进行文件写入。',
            ],
            'clarity_score': 90,
            'clarity_gate': 'auto',
            'parse_status': 'ok',
            'policy_extract_ok': True,
        }
    ],
)
base = 'http://127.0.0.1:8098'
entry_script = (repo_root / 'scripts' / 'workflow_entry_cli.py').resolve()
web_script = (repo_root / 'scripts' / 'workflow_web_server.py').resolve()
proc = subprocess.Popen(
    [
        sys.executable,
        str(web_script),
        '--root', runtime_root.as_posix(),
        '--entry-script', entry_script.as_posix(),
        '--agent-search-root', fixture_root.as_posix(),
        '--host', '127.0.0.1',
        '--port', '8098',
    ],
    cwd=str(repo_root),
    stdout=subprocess.PIPE,
    stderr=subprocess.PIPE,
    text=True,
)
try:
    gate.wait_health(base)
    gate.close_existing_sessions(base)
    session_payload, create_mode = gate.create_session_with_fallback(
        base,
        agent_name='trainer',
        focus='lock-smoke',
        agent_search_root=fixture_root.as_posix(),
        is_test_data=True,
    )
    session_id = str(session_payload['session_id'])
    runs = []
    for idx in range(2):
        expected = f'LOCK-SMOKE-{idx + 1}'
        status, payload = gate.call(
            base,
            'POST',
            '/api/tasks/execute',
            {
                'agent_name': 'trainer',
                'session_id': session_id,
                'focus': 'lock-smoke',
                'agent_search_root': fixture_root.as_posix(),
                'message': f'只回复标签 {expected}',
            },
        )
        if status "'!= 202 or not payload.get('"'ok'):
            raise RuntimeError(f'task create failed round={idx + 1}: {status} {payload}')
        task_id = str(payload['task_id'])
        row = gate.wait_task_done(base, task_id, timeout=180)
        msg_status, msg_payload = gate.call(base, 'GET', f'/api/chat/sessions/{session_id}/messages')
        messages = list(msg_payload.get('messages') or []) if msg_status == 200 else []
        assistant_messages = [
            str(item.get('content') or '')
            for item in messages
            if str(item.get('role') or '') == 'assistant'
        ]
        assistant_reply = assistant_messages[-1] if assistant_messages else ''
        runs.append(
            {
                'round': idx + 1,
                'task_id': task_id,
                'status': row.get('status'),
                'summary': row.get('summary'),
                'assistant_reply': assistant_reply,
                'assistant_contains_expected': expected in assistant_reply,
            }
        )
    ok = all(str(item['status']).lower() == 'success' and item['assistant_contains_expected'] for item in runs)
    if not ok:
        raise RuntimeError(json.dumps({'create_mode': create_mode, 'session_id': session_id, 'runs': runs}, ensure_ascii=False))
    print(json.dumps({'ok': True, 'create_mode': create_mode, 'session_id': session_id, 'runs': runs}, ensure_ascii=False))
finally:
    try:
        proc.terminate()
        proc.wait(timeout=10)
    except Exception:
        proc.kill()

fixture_root = gate.write_agents_fixture(runtime_root)
upsert_policy_cache(
    runtime_root=runtime_root,
    workspace_root=fixture_root,
    specs=[
        {
            'agent_name': 'trainer',
            'role_profile': '你是训练执行助手。',
            'session_goal': '在职责边界内完成用户要求并输出可验证结果。',
            'duty_constraints': [
                '先复述任务目标与约束，再给执行步骤。',
                '输出必须包含可验证结果与回归检查点。',
                '仅在 agent_search_root 范围内进行文件写入。',
            ],
            'clarity_score': 90,
            'clarity_gate': 'auto',
            'parse_status': 'ok',
            'policy_extract_ok': True,
        }
    ],
)
base = 'http://127.0.0.1:8098'
entry_script = (repo_root / 'scripts' / 'workflow_entry_cli.py').resolve()
web_script = (repo_root / 'scripts' / 'workflow_web_server.py').resolve()
proc = subprocess.Popen(
    [
        sys.executable,
        str(web_script),
        '--root', runtime_root.as_posix(),
        '--entry-script', entry_script.as_posix(),
        '--agent-search-root', fixture_root.as_posix(),
        '--host', '127.0.0.1',
        '--port', '8098',
    ],
    cwd=str(repo_root),
    stdout=subprocess.PIPE,
    stderr=subprocess.PIPE,
    text=True,
)
try:
    gate.wait_health(base)
    gate.close_existing_sessions(base)
    session_payload, create_mode = gate.create_session_with_fallback(
        base,
        agent_name='trainer',
        focus='lock-smoke',
        agent_search_root=fixture_root.as_posix(),
        is_test_data=True,
    )
    session_id = str(session_payload['session_id'])
    runs = []
    for idx in range(2):
        expected = f'LOCK-SMOKE-{idx + 1}'
        status, payload = gate.call(
            base,
            'POST',
            '/api/tasks/execute',
            {
                'agent_name': 'trainer',
                'session_id': session_id,
                'focus': 'lock-smoke',
                'agent_search_root': fixture_root.as_posix(),
                'message': f'只回复标签 {expected}',
            },
        )
        if status "'!= 202 or not payload.get('"'ok'):
            raise RuntimeError(f'task create failed round={idx + 1}: {status} {payload}')
        task_id = str(payload['task_id'])
        row = gate.wait_task_done(base, task_id, timeout=180)
        msg_status, msg_payload = gate.call(base, 'GET', f'/api/chat/sessions/{session_id}/messages')
        messages = list(msg_payload.get('messages') or []) if msg_status == 200 else []
        assistant_messages = [
            str(item.get('content') or '')
            for item in messages
            if str(item.get('role') or '') == 'assistant'
        ]
        assistant_reply = assistant_messages[-1] if assistant_messages else ''
        runs.append(
            {
                'round': idx + 1,
                'task_id': task_id,
                'status': row.get('status'),
                'summary': row.get('summary'),
                'assistant_reply': assistant_reply,
                'assistant_contains_expected': expected in assistant_reply,
            }
        )
    ok = all(str(item['status']).lower() == 'success' and item['assistant_contains_expected'] for item in runs)
    if not ok:
        raise RuntimeError(json.dumps({'create_mode': create_mode, 'session_id': session_id, 'runs': runs}, ensure_ascii=False))
    print(json.dumps({'ok': True, 'create_mode': create_mode, 'session_id': session_id, 'runs': runs}, ensure_ascii=False))
finally:
    try:
        proc.terminate()
        proc.wait(timeout=10)
    except Exception:
        proc.kill()

function Add-RunLogLine {
    param([string]$Line)

    Add-Content -Path $runLogPath -Value $Line -Encoding UTF8
}

function Get-DirectoryStats {
    param([string]$Path)

    if (-not (Test-Path -Path $Path)) {
        return [ordered]@{
            file_count = 0
            total_bytes = 0
        }
    }

    $files = @(Get-ChildItem -Path $Path -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
    $totalBytes = 0
    foreach ($file in $files) {
        $totalBytes += $file.Length
    }

    return [ordered]@{
        file_count = $files.Count
        total_bytes = $totalBytes
    }
}

function Build-SummaryMarkdown {
    param([object[]]$HistoryItems)

    $lines = @(
        "# Test Report Summary",
        "",
        ("- Generated At (UTC): {0}" -f (Get-Date).ToUniversalTime().ToString("o")),
        "",
        "## Last 20 Sessions",
        "",
        "| Session | Status | Exit | Duration(ms) | Started(UTC) | Command |",
        "|---|---:|---:|---:|---|---|"
    )

    $recent = @($HistoryItems | Sort-Object started_at_utc -Descending | Select-Object -First 20)
    foreach ($item in $recent) {
        $commandText = [string]$item.command
        $commandText = $commandText.Replace("|", "\\|")
        if ($commandText.Length -gt 80) {
            $commandText = $commandText.Substring(0, 77) + "..."
        }

        $lines += ("| {0} | {1} | {2} | {3} | {4} | {5} |" -f `
            $item.session_id, $item.status, $item.exit_code, $item.duration_ms, $item.started_at_utc, $commandText)
    }

    if ($recent.Count -eq 0) {
        $lines += "| - | - | - | - | - | - |"
    }

    return ($lines -join [Environment]::NewLine)
}

  25:             "agent_name": str(payload.get("agent_name") or ""),
  26:             "agent_search_root": str(payload.get("agent_search_root") or ""),

  35:             "duration_ms": payload.get("duration_ms"),
  36:             "stdout_ref": paths["stdout"].as_posix(),
  37:             "stderr_ref": paths["stderr"].as_posix(),
  38:             "trace_ref": paths["trace"].as_posix(),
  39:             "events_ref": paths["events"].as_posix(),
  40:             "summary": str(payload.get("summary") or ""),

  44:                 task_id=task_id,

  46:             "created_at": str(payload.get("created_at") or _now_ts()),
  47:             "updated_at": str(payload.get("updated_at") or payload.get("created_at") or _now_ts()),
  48:             "event_seq": 0,

  50:         _write_json(paths["run"], record)

  55:         _sync_task_run_index(root, task_id)

  59: def get_task_run_record(root: Path, task_id: str) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
  60:     ensure_store(root)
  61:     record = _load_json_dict(run_record_path(root, task_id))
  62:     if not record:
  63:         return None
  64:     stdout_ref = str(record.get("stdout_ref") or "")
  65:     stderr_ref = str(record.get("stderr_ref") or "")
  66:     record["stdout"] = Path(stdout_ref).read_text(encoding="utf-8") if stdout_ref and Path(stdout_ref).exists() else ""
  67:     record["stderr"] = Path(stderr_ref).read_text(encoding="utf-8") if stderr_ref and Path(stderr_ref).exists() else ""
  68:     return record

  71: def list_task_run_records(root: Path, *, session_id: str = "", limit: int = 200) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
  72:     ensure_store(root)
  73:     rows = _record_index.list_task_run_records_from_index(root, session_id=session_id, limit=limit)
  74:     if rows:

  76:     fallback: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
  77:     for path in sorted(runs_root(root).glob("*/run.json"), key=lambda item: item.as_posix().lower()):

  80:             continue
  81:         if session_id and str(record.get("session_id") or "") != str(session_id or ""):
  82:             continue
  83:         fallback.append(record)
  84:     fallback.sort(key=lambda item: str(item.get("created_at") or ""))
  85:     return fallback[: max(1, min(int(limit), 2000))]

  88: def update_task_run_record(root: Path, task_id: str, patch: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
  89:     ensure_store(root)
  90:     with _STORE_LOCK:

  97:         _sync_task_run_index(root, task_id)

 111:     root: Path,
 112:     task_id: str,
 113:     *,
 114:     session_id: str,
 115:     agent_name: str,
 116:     agent_search_root: str,
 117:     status: str,

 159: def update_task_run_result_files(
 160:     root: Path,
 161:     task_id: str,
 162:     *,
 163:     stdout_text: str,
 164:     stderr_text: str,
 165:     trace_payload: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
 166: ) -> None:

 169:     paths["stderr"].write_text(stderr_text or "", encoding="utf-8")

 175:     return _load_json_dict(run_trace_path(root, task_id))

 178: def append_task_run_event_record(root: Path, task_id: str, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> int:
 179:     ensure_store(root)
 180:     with _STORE_LOCK:
 181:         record = _load_json_dict(run_record_path(root, task_id))
 182:         if not record:
 183:             raise RuntimeError("task run not found")
 184:         next_id = int(record.get("event_seq") or 0) + 1
 185:         row_payload = dict(payload.get("payload") or {})
 186:         if row_payload.get("ref"):
 187:             row_payload["ref"] = normalize_work_record_ref(
 188:                 root,
 189:                 str(row_payload.get("ref") or ""),
 190:                 task_id=task_id,
 191:             )
 192:         row = {
 193:             "event_id": next_id,
 194:             "timestamp": str(payload.get("timestamp") or _now_ts()),
 195:             "event_type": str(payload.get("event_type") or ""),
 196:             "payload": row_payload,
 197:         }
 198:         _append_jsonl(run_events_path(root, task_id), row)
 199:         record["event_seq"] = next_id
 200:         record["updated_at"] = row["timestamp"]
 201:         _write_json(run_record_path(root, task_id), record)
 202:         _sync_task_run_index(root, task_id)
 203:         return next_id
 204: 
 205: 
 206: def list_task_run_event_records(root: Path, task_id: str, *, since_id: int = 0, limit: int = 400) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
 207:     rows = _load_jsonl(run_events_path(root, task_id))
 208:     rows = [row for row in rows if int(row.get("event_id") or 0) > int(since_id)]
 209:     rows.sort(key=lambda item: int(item.get("event_id") or 0))
 210:     return rows[: max(1, min(int(limit), 1000))]

 213: def _append_markdown(path: Path, header: str | None, lines: list[str]) -> None:
 214:     path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
 215:     if not path.exists() and header:
 216:         path.write_text(header + "\n\n", encoding="utf-8")
 217:     with path.open("a", encoding="utf-8") as handle:
 218:         for line in lines:
 219:             handle.write(line + "\n")
 220:         handle.write("\n")

## 运行开关（顶部手动切换）
1. `DIALOGUE_RETRO_SWITCH: ON`
   - `ON`: 每轮对话结束后允许自动执行“复盘增量记录”（偏好变化、需求假设、验证动作）。
   - `OFF`: 禁止自动更新复盘相关文件；仅在用户明确指令时更新：
     - `state/session-snapshot.md`
     - `state/user-preferences.md`
     - `logs/runs/*.md`

## 启动读取顺序
1. 顶层治理入口固定先读 `AGENTS.md`。
2. 默认会话按以下顺序继续读取：
   - `.codex/SOUL.md`
   - `.codex/USER.md`
   - `.codex/MEMORY.md`
   - `.codex/memory/全局记忆总览.md`
   - `.codex/memory/YYYY-MM/记忆总览.md`
   - `.codex/memory/YYYY-MM/YYYY-MM-DD.md`
3. 当日日记缺失时，先在对应 `YYYY-MM/` 目录创建当日日记，再进入正式工作。
4. 工作日切后的首轮工作，先检查“昨日记忆”是否已归档到对应 `.codex/memory/YYYY-MM/记忆总览.md`。
5. 工作月切后的首轮工作，先检查“上月记忆总览”是否已归档到 `.codex/memory/全局记忆总览.md`。

## 三层职责边界
- `.codex/`：agent 工作记忆、内部工作文档、本地技能入口（如 `.codex/skills/*/SKILL.md`）。
- `state/`：产品运行态、运行数据库、会话快照与复盘态。
- `logs/`：运行与审计留痕、执行记录、证据归档。
- 禁止把 `.codex/MEMORY.md`、`.codex/memory/**/*.md` 当成产品运行态、配置文件或审计日志使用。

## Project Structure & Module Organization
- `src/workflow_app/`：核心源码目录（服务端、CLI、运行时与前端模块源码）。
- `scripts/`：入口与运维脚本目录（对 `src/workflow_app` 的兼容启动包装 + 工具脚本）。
- `scripts/acceptance/`：门禁验收脚本目录。
- `docs/workflow/`：需求、门禁和证据矩阵文档，先读这里再改流程。
- `logs/`：运行与审计留痕。重点子目录：`events/`（JSONL 事件流）、`runs/`（执行记录）、`decisions/`（决策日志）、`summaries/`（汇总）。
- `state/`：运行态数据（如 `state/workflow.db`、`session-snapshot.md`、`change-log.md`）。
- `metrics/` 与 `incidents/`：性能基线和故障记录。

## Build, Test, and Development Commands
- `.\run_workflow.bat`：Windows 一键启动（调用 `scripts/launch_workflow.ps1` 并打开页面）。
- `powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/launch_workflow.ps1 -OpenBrowser`：可控启动（支持 `-BindHost/-Port/-SkipBackfill`）。
- `python scripts/workflow_web_server.py --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8090`：仅启动 Web 服务（用于本地接口联调）。
- `python scripts/workflow_entry_cli.py --mode status`：刷新并查看待分析/待训练状态。
- `python scripts/workflow_entry_cli.py --mode backfill`：将 `logs/events/*.jsonl` 回填到 SQLite。
- `python scripts/acceptance/run_acceptance_workflow_gate.py --root . --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8098`：执行 workflow 门禁验收。

## Coding Style & Naming Conventions
- Python 使用 4 空格缩进，优先类型标注与 `pathlib.Path`，函数名使用 `snake_case`。
- JavaScript 保持 ES 语法与 `camelCase` 变量命名；常量使用 `UPPER_SNAKE_CASE`。
- 新增脚本命名遵循 `scripts/<action>_<target>.py`，日志文件遵循 `logs/runs/<topic>-YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS.md`。

## Testing Guidelines
- 当前主测试入口是门禁脚本（非 pytest 套件）。改动 API/流程时，优先补充 `run_acceptance_workflow_gate.py` 对应 case。
- 验收结果需落盘到 `logs/runs/`，并在必要时更新 `docs/workflow/验收证据矩阵-Phase0.md`。
- 最低回归建议：`healthz` 可用、会话创建成功、任务可中断并可重试、训练链路事件可查询。

## Architecture & Workflow Notes
- 典型链路：`workflow_web_server.py` 接收请求 -> `task_agent_runner.py` 执行任务 -> 事件与消息写入 `state/workflow.db` 与 `logs/events/*.jsonl`。
- 前端资源由后端直接托管，核心交互脚本已拆分到 `src/workflow_app/web_client/*.js`（由 `workflow_web_server.py` 运行时拼接），修改 UI 时需同步检查 API 字段兼容性。
- 训练相关状态通过队列与事件表回放，调试时优先对照 `logs/runs/` 报告与 `state/change-log.md`。

## Commit & Pull Request Guidelines
- 当前工作区未包含 `.git` 历史，建议统一采用 Conventional Commits：`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `chore:`。
- 提交信息建议包含作用域，如：`fix(workflow): block $root traversal on write targets`。
- PR 至少包含：变更目的、影响范围、验证命令、关键日志路径；涉及 UI 时附页面截图。
- 单个 PR 建议聚焦单一主题（例如仅修复路径安全或仅调整训练队列 UI），避免把流程改造与文档重写混在一次提交中。

## Security & Configuration Tips
- 真实模型调用依赖环境变量：`WORKFLOW_AGENT_BASE_URL`、`WORKFLOW_AGENT_API_KEY`、`WORKFLOW_AGENT_MODEL`。
- 严禁提交密钥或包含敏感信息的 trace；提交前检查 `logs/` 与 `state/` 新增文件。
- 所有写入路径必须限制在 `agent_search_root` 内，保持 `$root` 越界拦截行为不回退。

## PM Continuous Maintenance
- 仅当 `DIALOGUE_RETRO_SWITCH: ON` 时，才自动写入每轮复盘增量；`OFF` 时只读不写，除非用户明确要求更新。
- 用户偏好与需求假设统一维护在 `state/user-preferences.md`（单一事实源）。
- 每次更新执行快照（如 `state/session-snapshot.md`、`logs/runs/*.md`）时，不重复粘贴全文，只追加引用：`preference_ref: state/user-preferences.md` 与本次增量观察。
- `User Preferences` 只记录可观察偏好，例如：响应风格、交付粒度、容错策略、优先级倾向；避免记录无关隐私。
- `Need Hypotheses` 使用固定格式：`Observation -> Inference -> Validation Action -> Confidence(High/Med/Low)`。
- 需求揣测采用“行为心理线索 + JTBD”方法：从措辞、催促频率、验收关注点推断深层目标，再通过下一轮需求确认闭环。
- 禁止把推测当事实；任何心理层推断都要在后续对话中显式求证并允许用户否定。
- `.codex/MEMORY.md` 只维护记忆规范；禁止把具体轮次总结直接写进该文件。
- `.codex/memory/全局记忆总览.md` 只归档已闭月的月度总结；当前活动月份只保留索引，不复制当月当日增量。
- `.codex/memory/YYYY-MM/记忆总览.md` 只归档截至昨日的日级摘要；今日总结仅写入当日日记，待日切后再汇总。
- 每轮工作结束后，都要向 `.codex/memory/YYYY-MM/YYYY-MM-DD.md` 追加一条带时间戳的本轮总结。
- 若发生日切但月未切，先补齐“昨日 -> 月度总览”的归档检查，再继续工作。
- 若发生月切，先补齐“昨日 -> 对应月度总览”与“上月总览 -> 全局总览”的归档检查，再继续工作。

### Snapshot Addendum Template
```md
- preference_ref: state/user-preferences.md
- delta_observation: <本次新增观察>
- delta_validation: <下一轮验证动作>
```



4. 在正式发布成功后同步绑定角色详情来源。

## Purpose
- This file is the top-level memory spec for the current workspace.
- Keep concrete round summaries out of this file; write them into daily memory files only.
- Treat `.codex/` as agent memory and internal guidance, never as product runtime state.

## Required Read Order
1. `AGENTS.md`
2. `.codex/SOUL.md`
3. `.codex/USER.md`
4. `.codex/MEMORY.md`
5. `.codex/memory/全局记忆总览.md`
6. `.codex/memory/YYYY-MM/记忆总览.md`
7. `.codex/memory/YYYY-MM/YYYY-MM-DD.md`

## Directory Model
- Global overview: `.codex/memory/全局记忆总览.md`
- Monthly overview: `.codex/memory/YYYY-MM/记忆总览.md`
- Daily memory: `.codex/memory/YYYY-MM/YYYY-MM-DD.md`

## Write Rules
- Every work round ends with one timestamped summary appended to the current daily memory file.
- Each daily entry should prefer a structured recall format: `topic`, `context`, `actions`, `decisions`, `validation`, `artifacts`, `next`.
- The current day's summary stays only in the daily file until the next day starts.
- The current month's overview stores only archived daily summaries up to yesterday.
- The global overview stores only archived monthly summaries for closed months.

## Daily Entry Detail Standard
- `topic`: what this round was mainly about.
- `context`: why the round happened, including the trigger or detected gap.
- `actions`: what was changed, created, migrated, or checked.
- `decisions`: rules or conclusions that affect later work.
- `validation`: commands, checks, and observed outcomes.
- `artifacts`: the most important files or directories touched.
- `next`: follow-up work, deferred checks, or rollover conditions.
- Keep entries concise but complete enough that a later reader can reconstruct the round without reopening a large number of unrelated files.

## Rollover Checks
- Day rollover: before the first round of a new day, verify yesterday's daily memory is summarized in the matching monthly overview.
- Month rollover: before the first round of a new month, verify the previous month's overview is summarized in the global overview.
- If a required overview entry is missing, archive it first and then continue normal work.

## Validation Commands
- `python scripts/manage_codex_memory.py status --root .`
- `python scripts/manage_codex_memory.py verify-rollups --root .`
- `python scripts/manage_codex_memory.py append --root . --summary "<round summary>"`
- `python scripts/manage_codex_memory.py append --root . --topic "<topic>" --context "<context>" --actions "<action1|action2>" --decisions "<decision1|decision2>" --validation "<check1|check2>"`

---

# Test Session Manager

## Core Workflow

1. Start a test session before any test command.
2. Create `./.test/<timestamp>/` with `logs/`, `tmp/`, and `artifacts/`.
3. Run tests through the wrapper script so stdout/stderr and metadata are recorded.
4. Auto-generate session report files and append global history for monitoring.
5. Place all temporary and intermediate outputs in the session directory.
6. Use the cleanup script to remove old or unnecessary sessions while preserving reports by default.

Never run tests directly when this skill applies. Always use `scripts/run-test-in-session.ps1`.

## Commands

- Create session only:
  - `powershell.exe -File .agents/skills/test-session-manager/scripts/start-test-session.ps1 -RootPath .`
- Run tests with logging and isolated temp:
  - `powershell.exe -File .agents/skills/test-session-manager/scripts/run-test-in-session.ps1 -RootPath . -TestCommand "pytest -q"`
  - `powershell.exe -File .agents/skills/test-session-manager/scripts/run-test-in-session.ps1 -RootPath . -TestCommand "npm test -- --runInBand"`
- Cleanup:
  - Remove one session: `powershell.exe -File .agents/skills/test-session-manager/scripts/cleanup-test-sessions.ps1 -RootPath . -SessionId 20260215-223000-123`
  - Keep latest N sessions: `powershell.exe -File .agents/skills/test-session-manager/scripts/cleanup-test-sessions.ps1 -RootPath . -KeepLatest 3`
  - Remove all sessions but keep reports: `powershell.exe -File .agents/skills/test-session-manager/scripts/cleanup-test-sessions.ps1 -RootPath . -All`
  - Remove all sessions and reports: `powershell.exe -File .agents/skills/test-session-manager/scripts/cleanup-test-sessions.ps1 -RootPath . -All -IncludeReports`

## Output Contract

- Session root: `./.test/<timestamp>/`
- Subdirectories:
  - `logs/` for execution logs
  - `tmp/` for temporary/intermediate files
  - `artifacts/` for framework outputs (coverage, junit xml, reports)
- Metadata files:
  - `session.json`
  - `command.txt`
  - `result.json`
  - `report.json`
  - `report.md`
  - `logs/test-run.log`
- Global report files:
  - `.test/reports/history.jsonl` (append-only history)
  - `.test/reports/summary.md` (latest 20 sessions overview)
  - `.test/reports/latest-report.md` (latest session report)

## Environment Variables Exposed During Test Run

- `TEST_SESSION_DIR`
- `TEST_LOG_DIR`
- `TEST_TMP_DIR`
- `TEST_ARTIFACTS_DIR`
- `TMP`
- `TEMP`
- `TMPDIR`

Use these variables to route framework output into the current timestamped session.

## Cleanup Rules

- Historical test sessions are preserved by default until explicit cleanup.
- Prefer `-KeepLatest` for routine cleanup.
- Use `-OlderThanDays` to prune stale sessions.
- `-All` removes session folders but keeps `.test/reports` by default for monitoring continuity.
- Add `-IncludeReports` only when you intentionally want to delete monitoring history.

## Scripts

- `scripts/start-test-session.ps1`: create `./.test/<timestamp>/` session directory.
- `scripts/run-test-in-session.ps1`: run tests with log capture, temp isolation, and automatic report generation.
- `scripts/cleanup-test-sessions.ps1`: cleanup session directories by ID, retention, age, or all (reports preserved unless `-IncludeReports`).

<code>workflow_tester</code> 的 AGENTS、提示词或模型调用内部，所以任何通过 <code>C:/work/J-Agents/.output/tasks/execute</code> 发起的任务都具备同样风险。</li>\n      </ol>\n    </section>\n\n    <section class=\"card\">\n   18: def bind_runtime_symbols(symbols: dict[str, object]) -> None:

  21: def _decref_session_lock(state: RuntimeState, session_id: str, lock: threading.Lock) -> None:
  22:     with state.session_lock_guard:
  23:         entry = state.session_locks.get(session_id)
  24:         if entry is None or entry.lock is not lock:
  25:             return
  26:         entry.ref_count = max(0, int(entry.ref_count or 0) - 1)
  27:         if entry.ref_count <= 0 and not entry.lock.locked():
  28:             state.session_locks.pop(session_id, None)
  29: 
  30: 
  31: def session_lock_for(state: RuntimeState, session_id: str) -> SessionLockEntry:
  32:     with state.session_lock_guard:
  33:         entry = state.session_locks.get(session_id)
  34:         if entry is None:
  35:             entry = SessionLockEntry()
  36:             state.session_locks[session_id] = entry
  37:         entry.ref_count += 1
  38:         return entry
  39: 
  40: 
  41: def acquire_generation_slot(state: RuntimeState, session_id: str) -> GenerationLease:
  42:     entry = session_lock_for(state, session_id)
  43:     lock = entry.lock
  44:     lock.acquire()
  45:     if not state.generation_semaphore.acquire(blocking=False):
  46:         lock.release()
  47:         _decref_session_lock(state, session_id, lock)
  48:         raise ConcurrencyLimitError(
  49:             f"generation concurrency limit reached ({MAX_GENERATION_CONCURRENCY})"
  50:         )
  51:     return GenerationLease(session_id=session_id, lock=lock)
  52: 
  53: 
  54: def release_generation_slot(state: RuntimeState, lease: GenerationLease | None) -> None:
  55:     if lease is None:
  56:         return
  57:     lock = lease.lock
  58:     state.generation_semaphore.release()
  59:     lock.release()
  60:     _decref_session_lock(state, lease.session_id, lock)

  68: def redact_command(parts: list[str]) -> list[str]:
  69:     out: list[str] = []
  70:     for item in parts:
  71:         text = str(item)
  72:         lower = text.lower()
  73:         if any(key in lower for key in ["api_key", "token", "secret", "password"]):
  74:             out.append("***")
  75:             continue
  76:         if text.startswith("sk-"):
  77:             out.append("***")
  78:             continue
  79:         out.append(text)
  80:     return out

  94:     trace_file = task_trace_file(cfg.root, task_id_text)

from __future__ import annotations

import json
import shutil
import subprocess
import sys
from pathlib import Path

repo_root = Path('.').resolve()
sys.path.insert(0, str((repo_root / 'scripts' / 'acceptance').resolve()))
import run_acceptance_workflow_gate as gate  # type: ignore
from policy_cache_seed import upsert_policy_cache  # type: ignore

runtime_root = (repo_root / '.test' / 'runtime' / 'task-execute-lock-smoke').resolve()
if runtime_root.exists():
    shutil.rmtree(runtime_root, ignore_errors=True)
runtime_root.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
fixture_root = gate.write_agents_fixture(runtime_root)
upsert_policy_cache(
    runtime_root=runtime_root,
    workspace_root=fixture_root,
    specs=[
        {
            'agent_name': 'trainer',
            'role_profile': '你是训练执行助手。',
            'session_goal': '在职责边界内完成用户要求并输出可验证结果。',
            'duty_constraints': [
                '先复述任务目标与约束，再给执行步骤。',
                '输出必须包含可验证结果与回归检查点。',
                '仅在 agent_search_root 范围内进行文件写入。',
            ],
            'clarity_score': 90,
            'clarity_gate': 'auto',
            'parse_status': 'ok',
            'policy_extract_ok': True,
        }
    ],
)
base = 'http://127.0.0.1:8098'
entry_script = (repo_root / 'scripts' / 'workflow_entry_cli.py').resolve()
web_script = (repo_root / 'scripts' / 'workflow_web_server.py').resolve()
proc = subprocess.Popen(
    [
        sys.executable,
        str(web_script),
        '--root', runtime_root.as_posix(),
        '--entry-script', entry_script.as_posix(),
        '--agent-search-root', fixture_root.as_posix(),
        '--host', '127.0.0.1',
        '--port', '8098',
    ],
    cwd=str(repo_root),
    stdout=subprocess.PIPE,
    stderr=subprocess.PIPE,
    text=True,
)
try:
    gate.wait_health(base)
    gate.close_existing_sessions(base)
    session_payload, create_mode = gate.create_session_with_fallback(
        base,
        agent_name='trainer',
        focus='lock-smoke',
        agent_search_root=fixture_root.as_posix(),
        is_test_data=True,
    )
    session_id = str(session_payload['session_id'])
    runs = []
    for idx in range(2):
        expected = f'LOCK-SMOKE-{idx + 1}'
        status, payload = gate.call(
            base,
            'POST',
            '/api/tasks/execute',
            {
                'agent_name': 'trainer',
                'session_id': session_id,
                'focus': 'lock-smoke',
                'agent_search_root': fixture_root.as_posix(),
                'message': f'只回复标签 {expected}',
            },
        )
        if status "'!= 202 or not payload.get('"'ok'):
            raise RuntimeError(f'task create failed round={idx + 1}: {status} {payload}')
        task_id = str(payload['task_id'])
        row = gate.wait_task_done(base, task_id, timeout=180)
        msg_status, msg_payload = gate.call(base, 'GET', f'/api/chat/sessions/{session_id}/messages')
        messages = list(msg_payload.get('messages') or []) if msg_status == 200 else []
        assistant_messages = [
            str(item.get('content') or '')
            for item in messages
            if str(item.get('role') or '') == 'assistant'
        ]
        assistant_reply = assistant_messages[-1] if assistant_messages else ''
        runs.append(
            {
                'round': idx + 1,
                'task_id': task_id,
                'status': row.get('status'),
                'summary': row.get('summary'),
                'assistant_reply': assistant_reply,
                'assistant_contains_expected': expected in assistant_reply,
            }
        )
    ok = all(str(item['status']).lower() == 'success' and item['assistant_contains_expected'] for item in runs)
    if not ok:
        raise RuntimeError(json.dumps({'create_mode': create_mode, 'session_id': session_id, 'runs': runs}, ensure_ascii=False))
    print(json.dumps({'ok': True, 'create_mode': create_mode, 'session_id': session_id, 'runs': runs}, ensure_ascii=False))
finally:
    try:
        proc.terminate()
        proc.wait(timeout=10)
    except Exception:
        proc.kill()

    $startScript = Join-Path -Path $PSScriptRoot -ChildPath "start-test-session.ps1"
    $SessionPath = & $startScript -RootPath $resolvedRoot
}

$resolvedSessionPath = (Resolve-Path -Path $SessionPath).Path
$logsPath = Join-Path -Path $resolvedSessionPath -ChildPath "logs"
$tmpPath = Join-Path -Path $resolvedSessionPath -ChildPath "tmp"
$artifactsPath = Join-Path -Path $resolvedSessionPath -ChildPath "artifacts"
